member_group_control.nulltext: ต้องระบุค่าเสมอ

as_letter.default: ณ สโมสรทหารบก

meeting_topic.default: ประชุมใหญ่สามัญประจำปี
meeting_topic.text: หัวข้อประชุม

root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control) as group_control_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.coop_position, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as member_group_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card, pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card) as form_id_card, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate('!adtm_date_1!' , 'วันDAYที่ SD MONTH YYYY') as adtm_date, '!as_time!' as as_time, '!as_letter!' as as_letter, '!an_year!' + 543 as an_year, '!meeting_topic!' as meeting_topic FROM sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b WHERE sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b.member_group_no /*WHERE*/ and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control between '!member_group_control_1!' and '!member_group_control_2!' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.represent_status = '1' order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
